Muni moments that define this city. The Mission. Nothing says San Francisco like that one Muni driver who stops to help a lost tourist with directions, while the bus waits, and the
taqueria. Mission. The line looks like a small housing crisis but moves fast. Best move is to go when the fog is still deciding what kind of day it is.
